p.strong: BPF Object → bpftool gen skeleton → Header with Map/Prog Accessors
p.em: Manual Reference: BPF CO-RE (Compile Once – Run Everywhere)

ol.li: Open — Parses embedded ELF byte array, initializes bpf_object.
Load — JIT compiles, runs kernel verifier, creates Map FDs.
Attach — Creates bpf_link per program (auto-attaches to tracepoints).
Destroy — Closes FDs, detaches links, and releases memory.

div.p: Note: The skeleton embeds the entire BPF ELF file as a static const char data[] byte array within the header, removing the need to distribute the .o file.
